nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Atlapetes
nodes.summary: Atlapetes（Atlapetes）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联32种鸟类，如Rufous-capped brushfinch、White-naped brushfinch、Yellow-thighed brushfinch等32种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rusty-bellied brushfinch
nodes.summary: The rusty-bellied brushfinch (Atlapetes nationi) is a species of bird in the family Passerellidae. It is endemic to Peru. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forest and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland. References External links Data related to Atlapetes nationi at Wikispecies BirdLife Especies, Technical sheet.
nodes.shortSummary: The rusty-bellied brushfinch (Atlapetes nationi) is a species of bird in the family Passerellidae. It is endemic to Peru.
